---
title: "Sound, Fine-grained Traversal Fusion for Heterogeneous Trees"
date: 2019-06-08
year: 2019
pdf: "https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3314221.3314626"
venue: "PLDI 2019"
code: "https://github.com/laithsakka/Grafter"
slides: ""
preprint: "https://arxiv.org/pdf/1904.07061.pdf"
video: "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j2henSFtZds&ab_channel=laithsakka"
author:
  - name: Laith Sakka
  - name: Kirshanthan Sundararajah
  - name: Ryan R. Newton
  - name: Milind Kulkarni
categories:
  - Conference
description: ""
---
